content: Renamed Chats -> Peers in UI/docs; /messages stays a chat
Peer search box filters connected peers by name/@username
Notifications are derived from posts; dismissals stored in DB table
Deletable notifications: swipe mobile + tap-reveal View/Delete desktop
Migration 022 applied to remote DB; deployed to prod (READY)
Empty feed/notifications: 022 junction table made posts->users embed ambiguous
Migration 023 dropped dismissed_notifications.user_id FK to de-junction; fixed embeds
Never give join tables a composite PK of exactly two FKs (PostgREST m2m trap)
Renamed People nav tab -> Discover to avoid People/Peers confusion
SessionWatcher keeps Supabase token refreshing so idle links stop dying
Streak day boundary now IST + date-keyed client trigger re-fires across days
effectiveStreak shows 0 when last login older than yesterday (IST)
okf-memory plugin built in separate sibling folder, not in techDate
